page.title: Log in
page.description: Access your space in Flavia. Sign in with your email to continue your conversations and personalized content.

form.title: Your space begins here
form.subtitle_email: Sign in with your email. No passwords, no complications.
form.subtitle_code: Enter the code we sent you.
form.spam_hint: If this is your first time, also check your spam folder.
form.privacy_notice: By continuing, you accept that your conversations are stored privately to improve your experience.

errors.expired_link: That link has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
errors.rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please wait a couple of minutes before trying again.
errors.send_code_failed: We couldn't send your code. Check your email and try again.
errors.invalid_code: That code is incorrect or has expired. Please check it and try again.
